feedback.text: I propose that you check the game industry for fairness against Consumers and the practices they use to increase prices and remove games without a notice and how the consumers are led to believe it's fair. I also think you should take a look at Credit card distributors because they are controlling most of the world I mean that's what I'm hearing when talking locally in my Local area and the web. Generally I think the digital life of consumers are being swept up unknowingly into a monstrous mouth of a shark and the people behind it is enjoying Luxurious things because of it or use it to control more of the world through bribes or such things. I'm only saying such things because I generally believe it's true. if I had a lot of money i would have made acts of kindness instead of generally loathing the world of poverniss as those with might does it's generally only bad people that sit on the might of lower people so I can only imagine the word that describes this in your mind whoever is reading these comments "Corruption" I don't think anyone is reading these comments because many of the comments is probably being filtered through a corrupt system that the kind people don't know about... I hope this is false. If these comments are being read maybe we could get an indication system of who is reading these comments or something or a physical letter that tells you your comment have been read because I don't trust systems that are vague and have little to no indication or something. I would say to the EU if you actually care about the people that makes the world run through physical acts or mental acts so you can enjoy wine then you should also keep them happy instead of letting big companies Gouple them up and after all the nourishments have been taken away they then just from them on the landfill. (Maybe these aren't great words but they are true if you actually take a look) THE EU has failed if you let companies run your Strategies in the background. Everybody have played a game once in their life time and they most likely enjoyed it but now it's in yepperdy because of Large companies or small activists groups and you the EU seems to care and that's great but we want to make a Blockage for Big companies and small activists, so they can't make changes that aren't great for happiness. To be fair the EU is the best area in the world right now so sorry about the big words I just can't explain myself with fancy words because they seem to not have any effect in this kind of world we are living in right now. Just 1 more thing if you remove steam in some kind of sense you will probably start world war 3 against gamers... (May this be some kind of truth and a joke on the same coin flip) Just ask your sciencetist because they know what I mean. The last few words I will tell you is. Have a great day and always have a view to the outside else you will get stressed... I heard.
